reviews.review_description: A very great game, but I wonder why is there 270 stars available on each stages, but we only get a maximum of 90 stars on 270....  30 stages of 3 stars each = 90 ...  where is the 180 stars left....?
💖Great❣game my friends I love it alot.💖

This was one of my preferred games on Rift. Some of puzzle and most of classic arcade. An incredibly well done game of match three balls in really immersive 3d. I'm so happy I can finally play it nativelly on my Quest. It's been ported to Quest with all its marvellous gameplay. Little graphics downgrade, all the emotion and full addictive. Thanks devs for this absolutelly must have. Wish you can get to the official Quest store and waiting for future updates to keep on playing

Pokerstarsvr is amazing but it says 18 + and a lot of kids are on that game they should sort it out
Apart from that it's great
But the game is not for me. It is too repetitive and I don't exercise out of this game. Graphically it is good.

If you loved playing Luxor / Zuma, you will probably love this one too. Colorful, fun and just all I loved about the Luxor game I played like 15 years ago. 😁 I have bought the full game now, so I am looking forward to more fun. Enjoy 👍🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

I think this is an instant classic in the making when it lands on the main Occulus store.
This is close to an essential buy.
